title: Background workout: continue when app closed, lockscreen badge
description: Workout continues when app is closed. Data still transmitted. iPhone lockscreen shows notification badge with workout name and realtime elapsed time.

title: Endpoint config: input field and persistence
description: UI field to input stream endpoint URL. Persist endpoint (UserDefaults or similar). Validate URL format.

title: Workout list: fetch and display built-in fitness workouts
description: Use HealthKit to query workout history. Show list of workouts from built-in fitness app. User can select one to start.

title: Pause and End workout controls
description: From live workout screen, user can Pause and End workout. Pause pauses session and stream; End stops session and closes stream.

title: Start workout: begin session and open data stream to endpoint
description: When user taps Start on selected workout, start HKWorkoutSession (or equivalent), open HTTP/WebSocket stream to configured endpoint. Send key metrics (heart rate, pace, etc.) over the wire.

title: Scaffold iOS app: Xcode project, minimal grayscale UX
description: Create new iOS app with Swift/UIKit. Single view app template. Grayscale theme. No storyboard or programmatic UI as specified.

title: Live metrics UI: heart rate, zone, energy, distance, pace, steps, location, elevation, elapsed time
description: Display live metrics on screen during workout: heart rate, heart rate zone, active energy, distance, pace, steps, location, elevation, elapsed time. Minimal grayscale UI.

title: Apple Watch sync: collect data from watch when present
description: App in sync with Apple Watch; collect workout data from watch when present (WatchConnectivity / HealthKit from watch).
